requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety of Lamps — GSO IEC 62471 vs GB/T 20145
requirement_topic.zh: 灯具光生物安全——GSO IEC 62471 与 GB/T 20145
requirement_topic.zht: 燈具光生物安全——GSO IEC 62471 與 GB/T 20145

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires for the Qatar market is assessed against the GSO-adopted version of IEC 62471 (photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems). The standard classifies products into Risk Groups (Exempt, RG1, RG2, RG3) based on actinic UV, near-UV, blue light, retinal thermal, and infrared hazards, with weighted radiance/irradiance limits and maximum permissible exposure times. Products in higher risk groups require hazard labelling and may face placement restrictions. Conformity is demonstrated through a photobiological safety test report against the GSO/IEC standard as part of QGOSM conformity where required for the product type.
summary.zh: 进入卡塔尔市场的 LED 灯及灯具光生物安全须依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62471 版本（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评定。该标准依据光化学紫外、近紫外、蓝光、视网膜热及红外危害，将产品分为危险组（豁免组、RG1、RG2、RG3），并规定加权辐亮度/辐照度限值及最大允许暴露时间。处于较高危险组的产品须进行危害标识，并可能面临投放限制。对于产品类型有此要求者，须在 QGOSM 符合性框架内通过依据 GSO/IEC 标准的光生物安全检测报告证明符合性。
summary.zht: 進入卡塔爾市場的 LED 燈及燈具光生物安全須依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 62471 版本（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評定。該標準依據光化學紫外、近紫外、藍光、視網膜熱及紅外危害，將產品分為危險組（豁免組、RG1、RG2、RG3），並規定加權輻亮度/輻照度限值及最大允許暴露時間。處於較高危險組的產品須進行危害標識，並可能面臨投放限制。對於產品類型有此要求者，須在 QGOSM 符合性框架內通過依據 GSO/IEC 標準的光生物安全檢測報告證明符合性。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (GSO adoption of IEC 62471, applied in Qatar by QGOSM)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which corresponds to IEC 62471 and uses the same Risk Group classification. For LED products, blue-light hazard assessment under GB/T 20145 is commonly referenced, and GB 7000.1 also incorporates photobiological/blue-light requirements for luminaires. GB/T 20145 is a recommended (T = 推荐) test standard; its mandatory force depends on the specific product certification scope.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），对应 IEC 62471，采用相同的危险组分类。对于 LED 产品，常引用 GB/T 20145 下的蓝光危害评定，GB 7000.1 也纳入了灯具的光生物/蓝光要求。GB/T 20145 为推荐性（T = 推荐）检测标准，其强制力取决于具体产品认证范围。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），對應 IEC 62471，採用相同的危險組分類。對於 LED 產品，常引用 GB/T 20145 下的藍光危害評定，GB 7000.1 也納入了燈具的光生物/藍光要求。GB/T 20145 為推薦性（T = 推薦）檢測標準，其強制力取決於具體產品認證範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR, corresponds to IEC 62471)
GB 7000.1 — incorporates photobiological/blue-light requirements for luminaires

gap.en: GB/T 20145 and GSO IEC 62471 both derive from IEC 62471, so the Risk Group methodology and limits are aligned. The gaps are administrative: (1) Qatar requires the photobiological assessment against the GSO-adopted IEC 62471 within QGOSM where applicable — a Chinese GB/T 20145 report is not automatically accepted, so a QGOSM-recognised test report may be required; (2) in China GB/T 20145 is a recommended-status test method whose binding force depends on the product's certification scope, whereas Qatar applies the GSO/IEC reference through QGOSM conformity for in-scope products; (3) confirm whether hazard-group labelling (e.g. for RG1/RG2 products) is required on Qatar-market packaging. Since the photobiological hazard is driven by the LED source spectrum and not the supply voltage, the 240 V vs 220 V difference does not change the Risk Group result. Verify the exact GSO/IEC 62471 edition applied.
gap.zh: GB/T 20145 与 GSO IEC 62471 均源于 IEC 62471，故危险组方法与限值一致。差距属行政层面：（1）适用时卡塔尔要求在 QGOSM 框架内依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62471 进行光生物评定——中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被自动接受，可能须提交 QGOSM 认可的检测报告；（2）在中国 GB/T 20145 为推荐性检测方法，其约束力取决于产品认证范围，而卡塔尔对范围内产品通过 QGOSM 符合性适用 GSO/IEC 参照；（3）须确认卡塔尔市场包装是否要求危险组标识（如 RG1/RG2 产品）。由于光生物危害由 LED 光源光谱决定而非供电电压，240 V 与 220 V 的差异不改变危险组结果。请核实所适用的 GSO/IEC 62471 确切版本。
gap.zht: GB/T 20145 與 GSO IEC 62471 均源於 IEC 62471，故危險組方法與限值一致。差距屬行政層面：（1）適用時卡塔爾要求在 QGOSM 框架內依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 62471 進行光生物評定——中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被自動接受，可能須提交 QGOSM 認可的檢測報告；（2）在中國 GB/T 20145 為推薦性檢測方法，其約束力取決於產品認證範圍，而卡塔爾對範圍內產品通過 QGOSM 符合性適用 GSO/IEC 參照；（3）須確認卡塔爾市場包裝是否要求危險組標識（如 RG1/RG2 產品）。由於光生物危害由 LED 光源光譜決定而非供電電壓，240 V 與 220 V 的差異不改變危險組結果。請核實所適用的 GSO/IEC 62471 確切版本。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — photobiological safety assessment against GSO-adopted IEC 62471 applied within QGOSM conformity where required for the product type; hazard-group labelling may apply for higher Risk Groups
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional — GB/T 20145 is a recommended test method; binding force depends on the product's certification scope; blue-light requirements also referenced via GB 7000.1

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted and applied in Qatar by QGOSM / MOCI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological safety for Qatar is assessed against the GSO-adopted IEC 62471 within QGOSM, using the same Risk Group framework as China's GB/T 20145. The two are IEC-based and technically equivalent, but the Chinese report is not automatically accepted and a QGOSM-recognised assessment may be required. The Risk Group result is driven by the LED source spectrum, so the 240 V/220 V supply difference does not affect it. Confirm whether hazard-group labelling is required on Qatar packaging and verify the applicable GSO/IEC 62471 edition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卡塔尔的光生物安全在 QGOSM 框架内依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62471 评定，采用与中国 GB/T 20145 相同的危险组框架。两者均基于 IEC 且技术等效，但中国报告不被自动接受，可能须提交 QGOSM 认可的评定。危险组结果由 LED 光源光谱决定，故 240 V/220 V 供电差异不影响该结果。请确认卡塔尔包装是否要求危险组标识，并核实适用的 GSO/IEC 62471 版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 卡塔爾的光生物安全在 QGOSM 框架內依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 62471 評定，採用與中國 GB/T 20145 相同的危險組框架。兩者均基於 IEC 且技術等效，但中國報告不被自動接受，可能須提交 QGOSM 認可的評定。危險組結果由 LED 光源光譜決定，故 240 V/220 V 供電差異不影響該結果。請確認卡塔爾包裝是否要求危險組標識，並核實適用的 GSO/IEC 62471 版本。

requirement_topic.en: Performance / Colour Quality Marking — GSO/IEC 62612 family vs GB/T 24908
requirement_topic.zh: 性能/色品质标识——GSO/IEC 62612 系列与 GB/T 24908
requirement_topic.zht: 性能/色品質標識——GSO/IEC 62612 系列與 GB/T 24908

summary.en: Performance characteristics of LED lamps/luminaires for the Qatar market — such as luminous flux, luminous efficacy, correlated colour temperature (CCT), colour rendering index (CRI/Ra), and rated lifetime — are characterised against the GSO-adopted performance standards (the GSO/IEC 62612 family for self-ballasted LED lamps performance, and related GSO/IEC photometric references). Declared performance values stated on packaging and in the GSO energy-efficiency label dossier (see ledqa-ecodesign) must be substantiated by testing to the relevant GSO/IEC performance standard. Mislabelling of CCT, CRI, lumen output, or lifetime can lead to non-conformity findings by QGOSM market surveillance.
summary.zh: 进入卡塔尔市场的 LED 灯/灯具性能特性——如光通量、光效、相关色温（CCT）、显色指数（CRI/Ra）及额定寿命——依据 GSO 采纳的性能标准（自镇流 LED 灯性能的 GSO/IEC 62612 系列及相关 GSO/IEC 光度参照）表征。包装上及 GSO 能效标签材料（见 ledqa-ecodesign）中声明的性能值，须由依据相关 GSO/IEC 性能标准的检测予以佐证。CCT、CRI、流明输出或寿命的标识不实，可能导致 QGOSM 市场监管认定不符合。
summary.zht: 進入卡塔爾市場的 LED 燈/燈具性能特性——如光通量、光效、相關色溫（CCT）、顯色指數（CRI/Ra）及額定壽命——依據 GSO 採納的性能標準（自鎮流 LED 燈性能的 GSO/IEC 62612 系列及相關 GSO/IEC 光度參照）表征。包裝上及 GSO 能效標籤材料（見 ledqa-ecodesign）中聲明的性能值，須由依據相關 GSO/IEC 性能標準的檢測予以佐證。CCT、CRI、流明輸出或壽命的標識不實，可能導致 QGOSM 市場監管認定不符合。

standards_or_laws: GSO/IEC 62612 family — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (GSO adoption)
GSO/IEC photometric measurement references for luminous flux, CCT, CRI, and lifetime

summary.en: China's equivalent performance standards include GB/T 24908 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements) and related GB/T photometric standards (e.g. GB/T 24824 measurement methods). These characterise luminous flux, efficacy, CCT, CRI, and lifetime for the China market. Declared values support the China Energy Label and CCC/CQC documentation.
summary.zh: 中国对应性能标准包括 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯性能要求）及相关 GB/T 光度标准（如 GB/T 24824 测试方法）。这些标准表征用于中国市场的光通量、光效、CCT、CRI 及寿命。声明值支持中国能效标识及 CCC/CQC 文件。
summary.zht: 中國對應性能標準包括 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈性能要求）及相關 GB/T 光度標準（如 GB/T 24824 測試方法）。這些標準表征用於中國市場的光通量、光效、CCT、CRI 及壽命。聲明值支持中國能效標識及 CCC/CQC 文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24908 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 24824 — Measurement methods for general lighting LED products

gap.en: GB/T 24908 (CN) and the GSO/IEC 62612 family (Qatar) both align with IEC 62612 / CIE photometric methods, so the performance metrics are measured comparably. The gaps are: (1) Qatar requires performance to be substantiated against the GSO-adopted reference within QGOSM and the GSO energy-efficiency label dossier — a Chinese GB/T 24908 report is not automatically accepted; (2) the GSO energy-efficiency labelling scheme uses the declared efficacy to assign the label class (see ledqa-ecodesign), so the test basis must match what GSO/QGOSM accept; (3) declared CCT/CRI/lifetime on packaging must satisfy GSO/QGOSM marking conventions, which may differ from the China Energy Label format. The performance result is driven by the LED engine and driver, not the supply voltage as such, but verify the product was tested at its declared operating condition consistent with a 240 V supply. Verify the exact GSO/IEC performance edition applied.
gap.zh: GB/T 24908（中国）与 GSO/IEC 62612 系列（卡塔尔）均与 IEC 62612 / CIE 光度方法一致，故性能指标的测量可比。差距在于：（1）卡塔尔要求在 QGOSM 框架及 GSO 能效标签材料内依据 GSO 采纳的参照佐证性能——中国 GB/T 24908 报告不被自动接受；（2）GSO 能效标签方案依据声明光效确定标签等级（见 ledqa-ecodesign），故检测依据须与 GSO/QGOSM 接受者一致；（3）包装上声明的 CCT/CRI/寿命须符合 GSO/QGOSM 标识惯例，可能不同于中国能效标识格式。性能结果由 LED 引擎与驱动器决定，本身与供电电压无关，但须核实产品在与 240 V 供电一致的声明工作条件下进行了测试。请核实所适用的 GSO/IEC 性能标准确切版本。
gap.zht: GB/T 24908（中國）與 GSO/IEC 62612 系列（卡塔爾）均與 IEC 62612 / CIE 光度方法一致，故性能指標的測量可比。差距在於：（1）卡塔爾要求在 QGOSM 框架及 GSO 能效標籤材料內依據 GSO 採納的參照佐證性能——中國 GB/T 24908 報告不被自動接受；（2）GSO 能效標籤方案依據聲明光效確定標籤等級（見 ledqa-ecodesign），故檢測依據須與 GSO/QGOSM 接受者一致；（3）包裝上聲明的 CCT/CRI/壽命須符合 GSO/QGOSM 標識慣例，可能不同於中國能效標識格式。性能結果由 LED 引擎與驅動器決定，本身與供電電壓無關，但須核實產品在與 240 V 供電一致的聲明工作條件下進行了測試。請核實所適用的 GSO/IEC 性能標準確切版本。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — declared performance (flux, efficacy, CCT, CRI, lifetime) must be substantiated against GSO-adopted IEC 62612 / photometric references within QGOSM conformity and the GSO energy-efficiency label dossier for in-scope products
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional — GB/T 24908 / GB/T 24824 characterise performance; declared values support the China Energy Label and CCC/CQC documentation

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted and applied in Qatar by QGOSM / MOCI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Declared performance and colour-quality values (flux, efficacy, CCT, CRI, lifetime) for Qatar must be substantiated against the GSO-adopted IEC 62612 / photometric references within QGOSM and the GSO energy-efficiency label dossier. China's GB/T 24908 uses equivalent IEC-based methods but the Chinese report is not automatically accepted. Marking conventions follow GSO/QGOSM rather than the China Energy Label. Confirm the test condition is consistent with a 240 V supply and verify the applicable GSO/IEC performance edition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卡塔尔市场声明的性能与色品质值（光通量、光效、CCT、CRI、寿命）须在 QGOSM 框架及 GSO 能效标签材料内依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62612 / 光度参照予以佐证。中国 GB/T 24908 采用等效的基于 IEC 的方法，但中国报告不被自动接受。标识惯例遵循 GSO/QGOSM 而非中国能效标识。请确认测试条件与 240 V 供电一致，并核实适用的 GSO/IEC 性能标准版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 卡塔爾市場聲明的性能與色品質值（光通量、光效、CCT、CRI、壽命）須在 QGOSM 框架及 GSO 能效標籤材料內依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 62612 / 光度參照予以佐證。中國 GB/T 24908 採用等效的基於 IEC 的方法，但中國報告不被自動接受。標識慣例遵循 GSO/QGOSM 而非中國能效標識。請確認測試條件與 240 V 供電一致，並核實適用的 GSO/IEC 性能標準版本。
